data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, Dogecoin Match Decline In Stock Futures As Nvidia Hit By China Chip Curbs: Analyst Hopes For New BTC All-Time High In Q2
data.description: Leading cryptocurrencies dipped alongside stock futures Tuesday as Nvidia Corp. (NASDAQ:NVDA) shares tumbled after being informed by the U.S. government that it will need a license to export chips to China.

data.title: How Kimberly-Clark, TXNM Energy, And Getty Realty Can Put Cash In Your Pocket
Nvidia, ASML, Interactive Brokers, Boeing, Tesla: Why These 5 Stocks Are On Investors' Radars Today
data.description: U.S. stocks slipped into the red today, with the Nasdaq Composite edging down 0.05% to 16,823.17. The Dow declined nearly 0.4% to 40,368.96.

data.title: Joe Biden Calls Social Security A 'Sacred Promise,' Slams Trump Administration's Efforts To Damage The Program: 'They're Shooting First And Aiming Later'
data.description: Joe Biden, in his first major post-White House speech, criticized the Trump administration's handling of Social Security, accusing it of job cuts and endangering benefits, while the administration fired back calling his claims false.

data.title: Trump To Reportedly Appoint Hunter Biden Whisteblower Gary Shapley As Acting IRS Commissioner: 'He'll Be A Great Asset'
data.description: Donald Trump reportedly plans to appoint IRS whistleblower Gary Shapley as acting commissioner, a move that signals his push to overhaul the tax system and reshape the agency.
